expected_change: Desert and construction surfaces converting to dense urban fabric roads stadium infrastructure and landscaped urban areas around Lusail.
notes: Good high-contrast urban/desert tile tied to World Cup-era development.

site: Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum Solar Park
expected_change: Desert surface converting to photovoltaic arrays access roads and solar-park infrastructure south of Dubai.
notes: USGS Earthshots includes 2020 and 2022 Landsat dates for this solar-park area.

site: New Administrative Capital east of Cairo
expected_change: Desert converting to new city blocks roads government district construction and associated bare-ground grading.
notes: NASA describes the new capital as a new city built on desert plains east of Cairo.

expected_change: Semi-arid grassland and bare ground converting to large photovoltaic arrays and service roads.
notes: Tile targets the large Gonghe/Talatan solar cluster near Longyangxia.

site: Tengger Desert Solar Park near Zhongwei
expected_change: Desert converting to photovoltaic arrays plus new internal roads and energy infrastructure.
notes: NASA describes the Tengger solar park as a 43 square kilometer solar installation.

expected_change: Cropland villages and bare construction areas converting to planned urban districts roads and public facilities.
notes: BRNN shows satellite before/after examples from 2021 to 2022; remote-sensing paper covers LULC change in Xiong'an.

expected_change: Agricultural and construction land converting to runways taxiways terminals aprons and airport service infrastructure.
notes: Airport officially launched in June 2021 so 2020 to 2022 should show strong infrastructure completion.

site: Baihetan Dam and Jinsha River reservoir
expected_change: River valley and shoreline areas converting to reservoir water after initial impoundment began in 2021.
notes: Nature paper reports Baihetan initial water storage beginning April 2021.

expected_change: Blue Nile valley converting to reservoir water with rapidly expanding impoundment behind GERD.
notes: USGS/NASA sources describe first filling in 2020 and reservoir expansion through 2022.

expected_change: Open water reclaimed sand and bare construction areas converting to new coastal urban land roads and buildings.
notes: Tile spans the Lagos waterfront where reclamation and construction are visually distinctive.

expected_change: Urban edge and vegetated or bare surfaces converting to open pits spoil piles tailings and informal mining disturbance.
notes: ABC/Planet Labs reporting shows rapid mine expansion near Kolwezi from 2017 to 2022.

site: BR-163 forest frontier near Novo Progresso
expected_change: Amazon forest converting to cleared pasture fields burn scars and access tracks along the BR-163 development corridor.
notes: Chosen as a BR-163 corridor stress case for forest-to-agriculture and forest-to-pasture conversion.

expected_change: Dry forest and shrubland converting to rectilinear cleared pasture or agricultural fields with roads and fire scars.
notes: NASA SVS and ESA describe extensive long-term deforestation and fire-linked land-cover transformation in the Gran Chaco.

site: Salar de Atacama lithium evaporation ponds
expected_change: Salt flat converting to expanded evaporation ponds roads and industrial lithium-extraction surfaces.
notes: NASA describes increasing evaporation ponds at Salar de Atacama to meet lithium demand.

expected_change: Former rural or bare land converting to a large factory footprint parking lots graded surfaces and access roads.
notes: Construction began in July 2020 with production before end of 2021 and opening in April 2022.

site: Dixie Fire burn area northern California
expected_change: Conifer forest converting to burn scar standing dead forest bare soil and early regrowth after the 2021 Dixie Fire.
notes: NASA visualization tracks the 2021 Dixie Fire spread from July to October.

site: Permian Basin oil and gas development
expected_change: Desert shrubland converting to well pads roads pipeline corridors and cleared industrial surfaces.
notes: Selected for small repeated anthropogenic disturbances rather than one large polygon.

expected_change: Dry cropland or scrub converting to solar arrays and grid infrastructure during Vietnam's 2020 solar buildout.
notes: Uses 2020 center year because several Ninh Thuan solar projects were built or opened in 2020.

expected_change: Forest plantation and rural land converting to cleared corridors roads government-area construction and exposed soil.
notes: NASA describes rapid change at the future capital site between 2022 and 2024.

expected_change: Cropland and open land converting to industrial estates housing roads and impervious urban surfaces.
notes: Tile targets Jakarta's eastern satellite-city expansion where outward built-up growth is well documented.

expected_change: Arid desert land converting to dense photovoltaic arrays service roads and grid infrastructure.
notes: Use as a large high-contrast renewable-energy tile; check imagery dates because some phases predate 2020.

expected_change: Seasonal wetland vegetation water and bare fill converting to built-up urban land roads and construction fill.
notes: Dhaka source reports 2000 to 2022 built-up expansion and loss of seasonal wetland vegetation.

site: Akkuyu Nuclear Power Plant construction site
expected_change: Coastal scrub and bare ground converting to reactor construction areas breakwaters roads spoil and industrial surfaces.
notes: Remote-sensing case study directly targets LULC change around Akkuyu construction.

site: Batemans Bay and Mogo Black Summer burn area
expected_change: Forest and woodland converting to severe burn scar followed by partial regrowth after the 2019-2020 bushfires.
notes: Use 2020 center year to compare pre-fire 2019 against post-fire 2021.

expected_change: Reservoir water converting to exposed sediment shoreline and dry land during the 2021-2022 low-water period.
notes: NASA describes Lake Mead dropping to its lowest level ever in 2021.
